{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = The Empire
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aurelian Empire]] is a global civilization and political entity that serves as a symbol of human stability and order. While the Emperor is considered an eternal, indispensable figurehead who possesses absolute power and once utilized a worldwide network of devices to project his intent, the actual administration of the world is managed by various delegates, governors, and ten [[Imperial Guilds]]. The Empire's structure relies heavily on these [[Guilds]]; for instance, the [[Consultants]] are a highly loyal group that has served the [[throne]] for two millennia, while the [[Champions]] are an ancient guild central to the history of [[Imperial]] unification. Following the murder of the Emperor five years ago, the Empire has remained largely functional due to this decentralized governance. Currently, four powerful [[Regents]] have emerged from hiding to divide and maintain control over the world's territories, preventing total collapse while upholding the principle that only an Emperor can truly rule. The Empire's capital is a massive, bustling city that houses the Emperor's expansive palace.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Rudeus Maxwell{{!}}Maxwell]] describes [[The Empire{{!}}the Empire]] as being sick.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Empire]] is a political entity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
